title: Totem of undying Ace
description: Carry the fire of Portgas D. Ace with this custom Totem of Undying. A must-have for One Piece fans in Minecraft.
body:
![Ace Totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/683c11189933ab3e518c074c8e7b561f53fb9fe7.png)

### 🔥 Overview

The **Portgas D. Ace Totem Pack** brings the Flame Commander into Minecraft. This pack replaces the **Totem of Undying** with a custom texture of **Ace**, making every clutch moment feel like you’re carrying the fire of the Whitebeard Pirates.

---

### ✨ Features

* Custom Totem of Undying styled after **Portgas D. Ace**.
* Works seamlessly in **Minecraft Java Edition**..

---

### 📥 Installation

1. Download the `.zip` file.
2. Place it into your `resourcepacks` folder.
3. Enable it from the Resource Pack menu.

---
